hero.badge: Data iliyothibitishwa • Hekima ya kukadiria • Imethibitishwa na rejista
hero.subtitle: Registry-verified supplier discovery and structured RFQ workflows. Operator-reviewed sourcing — not marketplace volume.
trust.byDecisionMakers: Imeaminiwa na watunga maamuzi duniani kote
integrations.sectionTitle: Inashirikiana na zana zako za sasa
home.supplierNetwork.subtitleSuffix: nchi—wamehakikishwa na usajili, kiwango cha kufuata sheria, tayari kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
home.supplierRegions.title: Wauzaji Kulingana na Mikoa
home.industries.title: Sekta 20+. Zilizochaguliwa kwa Uchumi Halisi.
home.industries.subtitle: Kuanzia madini na utengenezaji hadi huduma za afya na umeme—wauzaji waliothibitishwa na usajili waliobinafsishwa kwa usambazaji wa viwanda na B2B.
home.features.title: Imejengwa kwa ajili ya nyakati muhimu zaidi katika ununuzi
home.features.subtitle: Not a generic contact database. Registry-verified supplier records, landed costs, and structured RFQ workflows — built for industrial procurement teams.
home.showcase.title: Mawasilisho Yanayoharakisha Matokeo
home.showcase.subtitle: Uwazi kamili kuhusu wauzaji, gharama, na hatari. Rekodi {{suppliers}}—zinazoendelea kufanywa upya, zenye ishara kali, si nguvu za kikatili.
home.howItWorks.title: Kutoka kwa Utafutaji Hadi Maamuzi kwa Dakika
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Hatua tatu rahisi za usambazaji wenye busara. Hakuna ugumu. Matokeo tu.
home.step1.title: Tuambie Unachohitaji
home.step1.desc: Enter commodity, specification, quantity, destination, and lead time. Structured intake — not a keyword marketplace search.
home.step2.title: SmartSeek sourcing operator review
home.step2.desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your request, validates registry provenance, and routes RFQs to verified suppliers only.
home.step3.title: Fanya Maamuzi ya Kujiamini
home.step3.desc: Receive structured quotes with MOQ, lead time, Incoterms, and supplier provenance. You decide who to engage.
home.cta.title: Maamuzi Mahiri Yananzia Hapa
home.cta.subtitle: Structured RFQ workflows for industrial procurement teams. No fabricated scale claims during beta.
home.cta.footer: Hakuna kadi ya mkopo · Mpango wa bure · Ghairi wakati wowote
footer.tagline: Utafutaji unaoendeshwa na AI na ujasusi wa biashara kwa wanunuzi wa kitaalamu.
footer.designedFor: Mwanzo wa msambazaji. Kwanza kwa ujasusi wa biashara. Imetengenezwa kwa timu za manunuzi.
home.feature1.title: Intelligence ya Hatari
home.feature1.desc: Registry-verified supplier records with procurement-oriented metadata. Risk signals from published registry and trade data — not fabricated scores.
home.feature2.title: Kikokotoo cha Gharama za Kuwasili
home.feature2.desc: Pata gharama halisi ikiwa ni pamoja na ushuru, usafirishaji, bima, na mabadiliko ya sarafu. Uelewa wa biashara, si makisio. Hakuna ada zisizotarajiwa.
home.feature3.title: Pata Viongozi wa Ununuzi na Biashara
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} viongozi wa ununuzi na biashara—wameorodheshwa na AI kwa nia, taarifa za kampuni, na ishara za biashara. Sio kutupa tu. Takwimu za ubora, zinazoweza kuchambuliwa kwa timu za ununuzi.
home.feature4.title: Ufuataji Rahisi
home.feature4.desc: Uthibitisho unaotegemea rejista, ukaguzi wa vyeti, na michakato ya uidhinishaji. Takwimu za kiwango cha ufuataji ili uweze kuzingatia kile muhimu.
home.feature5.title: Takwimu za Wasambazaji wa Kimataifa
home.feature5.desc: Fikia wasambazaji {{suppliers}} waliothibitishwa na kuaminika katika nchi {{countries}}. Chuja kwa sekta, eneo, vyeti. Pata mwenzi wako kwa sekunde.
home.feature6.title: Sourcing reports
home.feature6.desc: Structured supplier comparisons and RFQ-ready specification summaries for procurement teams.
home.industry1.title: Madini na Minerali
home.industry1.desc: Antimoni, bati, lithiamu, kobalti, shaba, na madini adimu. Wasambazaji wa madini waliothibitishwa kwa mnyororo wa usambazaji muhimu.
home.industry2.title: Utengenezaji na Viwanda
home.industry2.desc: Pata malighafi, vipengele, na vifaa kutoka kwa watengenezaji waliothibitishwa duniani kote.
home.industry3.title: Electronics na Teknolojia
home.industry3.desc: Pata wasambazaji wa semiconductor, watengenezaji wa PCB, na wasambazaji wa vipengele vya teknolojia.
home.industry4.title: Bidhaa za Walaji na Rejareja
home.industry4.desc: Unganisha na wasambazaji wa ufungaji, bidhaa zilizokamilika, na bidhaa za lebo binafsi.
home.industry5.title: Magari na Usafirishaji
home.industry5.desc: Pata vipuri vya magari, vipengele vya OEM, na vifaa vya usafirishaji duniani kote.
home.industry6.title: Huduma za Afya na Vifaa vya Tiba
home.industry6.desc: Pata wasambazaji wanaokidhi viwango vya FDA kwa vifaa vya matibabu na bidhaa za afya.
home.industry7.title: Ujenzi na Vifaa
home.industry7.desc: Pata vifaa vya ujenzi, vifaa vizito, na vifaa vya ujenzi.
persona.procurers.headline: Punguza hatari. Boresha faida. Utimize kufuata.
persona.procurers.subline: Registry-verified supplier discovery, landed cost tools, and operator-routed RFQs for procurement teams.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Pata haraka. Panua kwa akili. Fungua mapema.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Pata wasambazaji walioidhinishwa kwa dakika, si wiki. Bei nafuu kwa startups na zana za kiwango cha biashara.
persona.suppliers.headline: Pata kuwajulikana. Pata zaidi ya RFQs.
persona.suppliers.subline: Jiunge na wasambazaji walioidhinishwa {{suppliers}}. Pokea maombi ya wanunuzi waliohitimu na kuimarisha biashara yako ya usafirishaji.
persona.producers.headline: Dhibiti gharama. Hakikishia ubora. Panua vyanzo.
persona.producers.subline: Kuchukua malighafi, kulinganisha gharama, na panua wasambazaji kwa viongozi wa uzalishaji.
methodology.title: Jinsi tunavyothibitisha wasambazaji
methodology.subtitle: Uwazi katika mbinu zetu hujenga uaminifu. Hapa kuna jinsi tunavyohakikisha uaminifu wa data.
methodology.step1.title: Kukusanya data
methodology.step1.desc: Tunakusanya data za wasambazaji kutoka kwa orodha za biashara, vyeti, na vyanzo vya biashara vilivyoidhinishwa. Grafu ya wasambazaji wa kimataifa inayosasishwa mara kwa mara.
methodology.step2.title: Uthibitisho
methodology.step2.desc: Kila msambazaji hupitia ukaguzi wa usajili wa biashara, uthibitisho wa historia ya biashara, na makadirio ya kufuata. Imeungwa mkono na orodha, kiwango cha kufuata.
methodology.step3.title: Kupima ubora
methodology.step3.desc: Vikadirio vyetu vinapima wasambazaji kwa wakati wa majibu, kiwango cha cheti, na maoni ya wanunuzi. Imeorodheshwa na AI, ina ishara kubwa.
methodology.step4.title: Ufuatiliaji wa mara kwa mara
methodology.step4.desc: Tunafuata ishara za hatari mara kwa mara na kusasisha hadhi ya msambazaji kulingana na data ya muda halisi. Utaalam wa kuthibitishwa, ulioungwa mkono na orodha.
integrationsPage.title: Unganisha SmartSeek na Stack Yako
integrationsPage.subtitle: Sawaisha wasambazaji, RFQs, na gharama zilizoafikia na mifumo yako ya ununuzi na ERP. OAuth ya bonasi moja, API salama, na viunganisho vilivyotengenezwa tayari.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Unganisha zana zako za ununuzi zilizopo. Data inabaki sawa kiotomatiki.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Chagua SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, au wengine kutoka orodha.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: Mchakato wa OAuth 2.0—hakuna nywila zinazoshirikiwa. SSO ya biashara inasaidiwa.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Wasambazaji, RFQs, na data za gharama hupita kati ya mifumo kwa wakati halisi.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: Buyer and supplier data is handled confidentially. TLS in transit, encryption at rest. SOC 2 attestation is in progress — we do not claim certifications we have not completed.
home.trial.title: Anza Jaribio Lako la Bure
home.trial.footer: Hakuna kadi ya mkopo • Ripoti 2 za bure • Ufikiaji kamili wa jukwaa
home.trial.risk: Tathmini ya Hatari na Uwekaji Alama
home.benefits.saveTitle: Hifadhi Wakati na Fedha Kwenye Kila Uamuzi
home.benefits.saveDesc: SmartSeek focuses on registry-verified discovery and operator-routed RFQs — not inflated outcome metrics.
home.benefits.compliance: Ufuatiliaji wa kufuata sheria kwa wakati halisi
home.benefits.securityDesc: Confidential RFQ handling, encrypted transport, and role-based access. Compliance attestation status is published when available.
home.benefits.encryption: Usimbaji wa data kutoka mwanzo hadi mwisho
home.benefits.audit: Kumbukumbu za ukaguzi na ripoti za kufuata sheria
home.ready.title: Je, uko tayari kufanya ununuzi kwa njia bora?
home.ready.subtitle: Anza kufanya maamuzi bora ya ununuzi leo. Hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika.
dashboard.subtitle: Operator-routed sourcing for procurement teams.
dashboard.sessionExpired: Sehemu yako inaweza kuwa imetoka muda.

auth.signupDesc: Create your beta account for registry-verified supplier discovery and structured RFQ workflows.
auth.forgotDesc: Weka barua yako pepe na tutakutumia kiungo cha kurekebisha
auth.tryAgainOrEmail: Tafadhali jaribu tena au tumia barua pepe / nenosiri.
auth.resetLinkSent: Kama akaunti inapatikana, tumetuma kiungo cha upya.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Karibu kwenye SmartSeek. Umepata mikopo 2 ya bure.
auth.serverError: Kosa la seva. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
auth.checkCredentials: Tafadhali angalia viwango vyako na ujaribu tena.
auth.validation.emailInvalid: Muundo wa barua pepe si sahihi
auth.validation.passwordLength: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi 6
auth.validation.acceptTerms: Lazima ukubaliane na Masharti ya Huduma
newsletter.invalidEmailDesc: Tafadhali ingiza anwani sahihi ya barua pepe.
newsletter.subscribedDesc: Utapokea ufahamu na masasisho ya vyanzo.
home.hero.badge: Ujuzi wa ununuzi kwa timu za ununuzi
home.hero.title1: Jua gharama halisi ya kuagiza kabla ya kujitolea
home.hero.subtitleBase: Pata wasambazaji, hesabu gharama halisi za kuagiza (usafirishaji, forodha, kodi, ndani ya nchi), na uamue kwa kujiamini.
home.hero.painLine: Acha kutuma barua pepe zisizo na majibu. Acha kudhani gharama. Acha kushangazwa na forodha.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Tafuta wasambazaji kwa nyenzo, mchakato, eneo, au cheti
home.integrations.label: Inajumuisha zana ambazo timu yako ya ununuzi tayari inatumia
home.feat1.quote: "Tunahitaji wiki 3 kutuma barua pepe kwa wasambazaji ambao hawajawahi kujibu — na bado tunapata wale wasiokuwa sahihi."
home.feat1.title: Pata wasambazaji waliothibitishwa kwa sekunde
home.feat1.desc: Mawasiliano yaliyoidhinishwa kutoka kwa wasambazaji {{suppliers}}. Yamepimwa kutoka kwenye orodha za kampuni, hifadhidata za biashara, na vyanzo vya tatu.
home.feat1.b1: Barua pepe na simu zimo — hakuna uwindaji
home.feat1.b2: Chuja kwa cheti, nchi, MOQ, wafanyakazi
home.feat2.quote: "Tulipanga bajeti ya $42k. Kihesabu kilisema $61k. Tofauti ilikuwa ni kodi ambazo hatukujua zipo."
home.feat2.title: Jua gharama zako halisi kabla ya kujitolea
home.feat2.desc: Kodi, usafirishaji, bima, ada za bandari, VAT — zimehesabiwa mapema. Hakuna mshangao wakati kontena linapofika.
home.feat2.b1: Utafutaji wa msimbo wa HS na viwango vya kodi vya moja kwa moja
home.feat2.b2: Uwasilishaji wa baharini FCL/LCL, angani, na huduma za haraka kulinganisha
home.feat3.quote: "Mtoa huduma wetu mkuu alikuwa katika eneo lililoanza kutokuwa na utulivu. Hatukuwa na mpango wa akiba na tulipoteza wiki 6 za uzalishaji."
home.feat3.title: Tambua hatari za mtoa huduma kabla hazijakugharimu
home.feat3.desc: Fuata ishara za hatari za usambazaji kati ya watoa huduma na maeneo kabla hazijakuwa mshangao ghali.
home.feat3.b1: Viashiria vya hatari za mtoa huduma na nchi katika mtazamo mmoja
home.feat3.b2: Bendera za kisiasa na za kufuata sheria kwa wakati halisi
home.pain.stat1desc: Wakati wa wastani ambao timu za ununuzi zinatumia kwenye utafiti wa mtoa huduma kwa mikono
home.pain.stat2desc: Kadirio la hasara ya kila mwaka kwa kampuni kutokana na gharama za uagizaji zisizoonekana na chaguo mbaya za watoa huduma
home.pain.stat3desc: Punguzo la wastani la gharama lililoripotiwa na watumiaji wa SmartSeek katika siku zao za kwanza 90
home.pain.footnote: Watumiaji wa SmartSeek wanapunguza kutoka masaa 14 ya utafiti wa kila wiki hadi chini ya 2. Hiyo ni masaa 12 ya kurudi — kila wiki.
home.hiw.title: Kutoka utafutaji hadi mkataba ndani ya siku — si miezi
home.hiw.step1.title: Pata
home.hiw.step1.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers by commodity, region, and specification. Matches include registry provenance — not scraped contact lists.
home.hiw.step2.title: Hesabu
home.hiw.step2.desc: Angalia gharama halisi ya kuwasili kwa sekunde. Linganisha wasambazaji kwa gharama jumla ya kuwasilisha, siyo tu bei ya kitengo.
home.hiw.step3.title: Amua
home.hiw.step3.desc: Submit structured RFQs reviewed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator. Quotes return with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms.
home.cta.title2: kutafuta kwa njia bora. Je, wewe?

home.pain.card1desc: kupotea kwa kila kampuni kila mwaka kutokana na gharama za uagizaji zisizojulikana

home.pain.card3desc: ni wastani wa muda wa kuthibitisha msambazaji mpya bila jukwaa letu

home.pricing.tierProDesc: Utafutaji usio na kikomo, kalkuleta gharama zilizofika, usafirishaji — jaribio la bure la siku 14
home.pricing.tierEnterpriseDesc: Uunganisho wa kawaida, msaada maalum, ufikiaji wa data nyingi
home.trust.directSource: Viungo vya wauzaji wa moja kwa moja
home.integrations.title: Inashirikiana na zana zako zilizopo
home.integrations.sectionDesc: Sawaisha wauzaji, viongozi, na data za ununuzi moja kwa moja katika mifumo yako ya ERP, CRM, na ununuzi. Hakuna uhamasishaji wa mikono.
home.demo.badge: Onyesho la Moja kwa Moja — Usajili Haujahitajika
home.demo.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers across industrial categories. Preview results are curated; full directory access is available to founding users during beta.
home.demo.placeholder: Jaribu: "mtengenezaji wa kitambaa cha pamba Uturuki" au "paneli za jua China"
home.demo.suppliersFound: wasambazaji wamepatikana — kuonyesha matokeo 3 ya bure
home.demo.enterProduct: Ingiza bidhaa, nyenzo, au sekta yoyote hapo juu
home.demo.clickQuick: Au bonyeza kutafuta haraka ili kuona matokeo mara moja
home.demo.freeUnlocks: Beta accounts unlock the full supplier directory and verified contact details where available.
home.capabilities.title: Mifumo mitatu ya akili. Jukwaa moja.
home.capabilities.subtitle: From verified supplier discovery to structured RFQ workflows — built for procurement teams.
home.capabilities.findSuppliersDesc: Tafuta wasambazaji wa kimataifa waliothibitishwa kwa bidhaa, nchi, vyeti, na ukubwa. Wako tayari kuwasiliana na alama za ubora.
home.capabilities.findLeadsDesc: Fursa za ununuzi na biashara zilizothibitishwa. Chuja kwa nia, sekta, eneo, na ukubwa wa kampuni. Imejengwa kwa ajili ya mawasiliano ya B2B.
home.capabilities.aiIntelDesc: Registry provenance, landed cost estimates, and structured quote comparison for procurement decisions.
home.trust.operatorRouting: Uelekezaji wa RFQ uliofanywa na waendeshaji
home.trust.structuredQuotes: Sehemu za nukuu zilizopangwa (MOQ, muda wa kuongoza, Incoterms)
home.trustBlock.heading: Taarifa halisi. Gharama halisi. Maamuzi halisi.
home.trustBlock.body: SmartSeek connects you to registry-backed supplier records and the full landed cost picture — not just unit prices. Built by cross-border sourcing operators, not a marketplace listing team.
home.trustBlock.bullet1: Rekodi za wauzaji zilizothibitishwa na rejista, hakuna makadirio yasiyo na msingi
home.trustBlock.bullet2: Gharama halisi iliyofika: usafirishaji, forodha, kodi, ndani — yote yamejumuishwa
home.trustBlock.bullet3: Viungo vya moja kwa moja kwa vyanzo na mawasiliano ya kampuni
home.trustBlock.cta: Request beta access — founding member pricing when paid plans launch
home.globalEngine: Injini ya Utafutaji wa Wasambazaji wa Kimataifa
home.hero.banner: Bila malipo wakati wa beta · Kikundi cha majaribio ya ununuzi kimefunguliwa
home.hero.titleLine2: kwa timu za ununuzi wa viwanda
home.hero.subtitle: Gundua wasambazaji waliothibitishwa wa metali za kimkakati na malighafi za viwanda. Wasilisha RFQ na upokee nukuu zilizopangwa kwa MOQ, muda wa kuongoza, na Incoterms kutoka kwa wasambazaji waliohitimu.
home.hero.builtFor: Imetengenezwa kwa timu za ununuzi wa viwanda zinazoshughulikia michakato ya ununuzi inayotegemea vipimo.
home.how.title: Mchakato wa ununuzi bila kelele za soko
home.how.step1Desc: Eleza unachohitaji: bidhaa, vipimo, kiasi, eneo, muda wa kuongoza. Inachukua dakika 2.
home.how.step2Desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your RFQ and routes it only to suppliers verified against public company registries.
home.how.step3Desc: Nukuu zinakuja na incoterms, muda wa kuongoza, MOQ, na asili ya msambazaji. Wewe unamua ni nani wa kushirikiana naye.
home.why.title: Hakuna profaili zilizokusanywa. Hakuna matangazo makubwa. Hakuna mchezo wa soko.
home.why.body: Every supplier we publish is checked against a company registry — SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR — and confirmed via direct contact. RFQs are routed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator, not by an algorithm.
home.why.pill3: Mawasiliano ya moja kwa moja na msambazaji, hakuna wakala
home.founding.body: Tunawakaribisha timu maalum za manunuzi wakati wa beta ili kila akaunti ipate msaada wa moja kwa moja katika upatikanaji wa wauzaji na uelekezaji wa haraka.
home.preview.lockTitle: Dirisha kamili linapatikana kwa watumiaji wa msingi
home.preview.lockBody: Bila malipo wakati wa beta. Tunawakaribisha wanunuzi kwa mikono ili kila akaunti ipate msaada wa upatikanaji.
home.sections.previewTitle: Wauzaji waliothibitishwa katika sekta na masoko ya kimataifa
home.sections.previewBody: A sample of registry-verified suppliers across metals, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. Full directory unlocked for founding users during beta.
home.trustStrip.directContact: Mawasiliano ya moja kwa moja na wauzaji
home.founding.noPayment: Hakuna kadi ya mkopo. Hakuna mfumo wa malipo wakati wa beta.
home.seo.description: Operator-led industrial sourcing platform with registry-verified suppliers, structured RFQs, and strong metals expertise.
